kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=HIS, url=http://192.168.5.19:1600, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: 16-UI - Assign Ward And Doctor

kw.name: Start Browser AdmitHis With Token
Open Browser
kw.msg: There was an error managing chromedriver (error sending request for url (https://googlechromelabs.github.io/chrome-for-testing/known-good-versions-with-downloads.json)); using driver found in the cache
Error sending stats to Plausible: error sending request for url (https://plausible.io/api/event)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Add Cookie
kw.doc: Adds a cookie to your current session.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.
باز کردن کروم + تزریق کوکی token

kw.name: Go To AdmitHis Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.
رفتن مستقیم به صفحه پذیرش بستری

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'css=.ngx-spinner-overlay,.loading-overlay,.spinner,.mat-progress-spinner,.cdk-overlay-backdrop' did not appear in 3 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'css=.ngx-spinner-overlay,.loading-overlay,.spinner,.mat-progress-spinner,.cdk-overlay-backdrop' did not appear in 3 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Select From Ng Select
Wait For Spinner Hidden
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.
صبر کردن تا loading Angular ناپدید شود

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg:

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

errors.msg: Error in file 'D:\Mehrshad\Test-Project\HisAdmit\AdmitHis-Test\AdmitHis.robot' on line 6: Initializing library 'SeleniumLibrary' with arguments [ screenshot_on_failure=False ] failed: ValueError: Invalid time string 'screenshot_on_failure=False'. Traceback (most recent call last): File "D:\Mehrshad\Test-Project\HisAdmit\AdmitHis-Test\.venv\Lib\site-packages\SeleniumLibrary\__init__.py", line 631, in __init__ self.timeout = _convert_timeout(timeout) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^ File "D:\Mehrshad\Test-Project\HisAdmit\AdmitHis-Test\.venv\Lib\site-packages\SeleniumLibrary\utils\types.py", line 42, in _convert_timeout return timestr_to_secs(timeout) File "D:\Mehrshad\Test-Project\HisAdmit\AdmitHis-Test\.venv\Lib\site-packages\robot\utils\robottime.py", line 61, in timestr_to_secs raise ValueError(f"Invalid time string '{timestr}'.") ValueError: Invalid time string 'screenshot_on_failure=False'.
